---
title: "CIS 351 Week 9 Wednesday 04/02/2025"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)

library(janitor)

library(palmerpenguins)
```

## Line Graph in `{ggplot2}`

**Example 1.** Create a line graph of the monthly mean tempeature.
```{r}

```

```{r}

```

## Line Graph by Group

**Example 2.** From `airquality`, plot the daily temperature for July and August.

```{r}

```
